description_long: This object consists of three sealed snack bags, each standing upright and featuring a modern, geometric design with bold, large text reading 'SNACK PACK MOCKUP' on the front. The bags are made of a glossy, flexible plastic material and display a gradient of colors: one in green and brown, one in peach and blue, and one in pink and purple. The front side is dominated by branding and stylized text, while the back side of each bag contains detailed nutritional information and product labeling. The bags are slightly puffed, indicating they are filled with air and likely contain lightweight snack foods such as chips or crisps. The side views reveal the thin profile and sealed edges typical of snack packaging. These bags are commonly found in urban environments such as convenience stores, vending machines, or park benches.
description: A set of three colorful, glossy snack bags with bold branding and nutritional labels, each featuring a modern geometric design and standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing three snack bags with large 'SNACK PACK MOCKUP' text and geometric color patterns.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin, sealed profile of the bags, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Back view revealing nutritional information panels and product labeling on each bag.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other thin, sealed edge of the bags.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information panels are visible on the back of each bag, including typical nutrition facts and ingredient lists.
